differentials.name: PATHOGNOMONIC passage of gritty flakes, soft-tissue stones, white chunks of tissue (= desquamated keratinized epithelial layers) → leading to colic, fever, chills
differentials.raw: PATHOGNOMONIC passage of gritty flakes, soft-tissue stones, white chunks of tissue (= desquamated keratinized epithelial layers) → leading to colic, fever, chills

context: =  KERATINIZING SQUAMOUS METAPLASIA / DYSPLASIA = DYSKERATOSIS Cause:   chronic infection (80%) / stones (40%) Histo:   large confluent areas / scattered patches of squamous metaplasia of transitional cell epithelium with keratinization + cellular atypia in deeper layers Location:   bladder > renal pelvis > ureter; bilateral in 10% √  corrugated / striated irregularities of pelvicaliceal walls; localized / generalized √  plaquelike intraluminal mass with "onion skin" pattern of contrast material in interstices √  caliectasis + pyelectasis common (with obstruction) √  ridging / filling defects
